welcome.title: Welcome to Quorum
welcome.subtitle: Your AI assistant for better conversations

features.customParticipants: Create custom AI participants with specific roles
features.saveConfigs: Save and share your favorite configurations

apiNote.text: Requires API keys from LLM providers. Usage may incur costs based on provider pricing.

consent.title: API Keys & Privacy Notice
consent.intro: Quorum requires API keys to function. Please note:

points.storage: Your API keys can be stored in your browser based on your preference
points.processing: All processing happens in your browser - your conversations never leave your device
points.access: We don't have access to your API keys or data
points.options: You can choose how your keys are stored:

consent.agreement: I understand and agree to these terms

settings.title: Settings
settings.setupWizardDescription: Restart the setup wizard to reconfigure your application from scratch.
settings.themeDescription: Choose from a variety of themes to customize the appearance of the application. Your last selected light and dark themes will be remembered when toggling.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Enter your API keys for the language model providers you want to use.
settings.participantsDescription: Manage AI participants for your round table discussions. Create, edit, and organize participants with different roles and personalities.
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize the appearance of the application.
settings.privacyDescription: Manage your privacy, data storage, and security settings.
settings.llmDefaultsDescription: Configure default settings for your AI language models.
settings.aboutDescription: Quorum is an open-source application that allows you to chat with multiple AI models simultaneously in a round-table format.
settings.dataStorageDescription: Your data is stored locally in your browser. You can clear all data at any time.
settings.apiKeyStorageDescription: Choose how you want to store your API keys.
settings.sessionOnlyDescription: Keys are cleared when browser is closed
settings.noStorageDescription: Keys are not saved (must re-enter each time)
settings.dataManagementDescription: Export or clear your data. All data is stored locally in your browser.
settings.dataSecurityDescription1: All your data is stored locally in your browser. No data is sent to our servers.
settings.dataSecurityDescription2: API keys are handled securely within your browser but can be exposed if someone gains access to your device.
settings.securityWarningDetails: Never share your API keys with others. If you suspect your keys have been compromised, regenerate them from your provider's dashboard.
settings.defaultSystemPromptPlaceholder: Enter a system prompt that will be used for new participants...
settings.defaultSystemPromptDescription: This system prompt will be used as a starting point when creating new AI participants.
settings.resetConfirmationDescription: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values?
settings.exportDataDescription: Below is all your data stored in this application. You can download it as a JSON file.

apiKeyManager.title: API Key Management
apiKeyManager.description: Enter your API keys for the language model providers you want to use.
apiKeyManager.label: Label (Optional)
apiKeyManager.noKeysConfigured: No API keys configured yet. Add a key to get started.
apiKeyManager.clearConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove all API keys? This cannot be undone.
apiKeyManager.openaiDescription: Required for GPT-4o and GPT-4.5 models

suggestions.checkApiKey: Verify your API key is correct and has not expired
suggestions.regenerateKey: Try regenerating your API key from the provider's dashboard
suggestions.verifyAccount: Check that your account is in good standing with the provider
suggestions.waitAndRetry: Wait a few minutes before trying again
suggestions.upgradeAccount: Consider upgrading your account for higher rate limits
suggestions.checkUsage: Check your usage dashboard for quota information
suggestions.modifyContent: Modify your content to comply with provider policies
suggestions.browserExtensions: Disable browser extensions that might interfere
suggestions.contactSupport: Contact support if the problem persists

theme.themeToggleInfo: Toggle between your preferred light and dark themes

welcome.title: Welcome to Quorum
welcome.heading: A round-table conversation with AI participants
welcome.description: Quorum helps you create engaging conversations between multiple AI participants with different roles and perspectives.

customParticipants.title: Custom Participants
customParticipants.description: Create AI participants with different roles, personalities, and expertise.

multiModel.title: Multiple Models
multiModel.description: Use different AI models from various providers for each participant.

saveConfigs.title: Save Configurations
saveConfigs.description: Save and reuse your favorite participant configurations and templates.

analyze.title: Analyze Conversations
analyze.description: Gain insights from conversations between different AI perspectives.

welcome.apiNote: You'll need API keys for the AI providers you want to use. We'll help you set this up in the next steps.

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Choose how you want to store your API keys. This affects how long your keys are saved and whether they persist between sessions.

localStorage.title: Local Storage
localStorage.description: Keys will be saved in your browser and persist between sessions. They will remain until you clear your browser data or manually remove them.

sessionOnly.title: Session Only
sessionOnly.description: Keys will be saved only for this session and cleared when you close the browser. You'll need to re-enter them next time.

noStorage.title: No Storage
noStorage.description: Keys will not be saved at all. You'll need to re-enter them every time you use the application. Most secure option.

security.note: Your API keys are never sent to our servers. They are only used to communicate directly with the AI providers from your browser.
security.changeNote: You can change this setting later in the Security section of the Settings page.

apiKeys.title: API Key Setup
apiKeys.description: Configure your API keys for the AI providers you want to use. You need at least one valid API key to continue.

participants.title: Configure Participants
participants.description: Set up at least one AI participant for your conversations. You can add more participants later.
participants.noParticipants: No participants added yet. Add at least one participant to continue.

participantForm.name: Name
participantForm.namePlaceholder: Enter a name for this participant
participantForm.roleDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe this participant's role or perspective (optional)
participantForm.systemPromptDescription: Instructions for how this participant should behave. Be specific about their role, expertise, and communication style.

templateForm.name: Template Name
templateForm.noParticipantsWarning: No participants available. Create participants first.
templateForm.conversationStarterPlaceholder: Enter a message to start the conversation with
templateForm.conversationStarterDescription: This message will be automatically sent when using this template

validation.participantRequired: At least one participant is required

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.selectPrompt: Select a participant from the round table to view details

activeParticipant.title: Active Participant
activeParticipant.description: This participant is currently selected and will be highlighted in the round table view.
